item.title: The Brazen Bank Heists: What Happened?
item.description: Michael Benanti and Brian Witham were responsible for several elaborate and violent kidnapping sprees and bank heists across the US. They would force their victims to rob banks and do their dirty work for them. It took quite some time before authorities caught on.

media:content.media:title: The Brazen Bank Heists: What Happened?
media:content.media:description: Michael Benanti and Brian Witham were responsible for several elaborate and violent kidnapping sprees and bank heists across the US. They would force their victims to rob banks and do their dirty work for them. It took quite some time before authorities caught on.

item.title: A Husband And His Secret Relationship Led To A Deadly Plot
item.description: George Tiaffay was arrested after investigators determined that his wife, Shauna Tiaffay, had been killed in a murder for hire scheme involving George and his girlfriend, Noel Stevens. The case exposed a web of betrayal, deception, and a plan that ultimately unraveled in court.

media:content.media:title: A Husband And His Secret Relationship Led To A Deadly Plot
media:content.media:description: George Tiaffay was arrested after investigators determined that his wife, Shauna Tiaffay, had been killed in a murder for hire scheme involving George and his girlfriend, Noel Stevens. The case exposed a web of betrayal, deception, and a plan that ultimately unraveled in court.

item.title: Open Marriage, Infidelity, & Murder | The Case of Robert Limon

item.title: She Was Heading Home From College When Everything Changed
item.description: The Sierah Joughin case shocked Ohio after the 20 year old college student disappeared during a bicycle ride near her home. Investigators later identified James Worley as the man responsible, and he was ultimately sentenced to death for the crime.

media:content.media:title: She Was Heading Home From College When Everything Changed
media:content.media:description: The Sierah Joughin case shocked Ohio after the 20 year old college student disappeared during a bicycle ride near her home. Investigators later identified James Worley as the man responsible, and he was ultimately sentenced to death for the crime.

item.title: She Left A Bar With Three Men And Never Made It Home
item.description: Savannah Spurlock, a 22 year old mother of four, disappeared after leaving a Kentucky bar with three men she had just met. Months later, investigators found her remains on a rural property, turning a missing persons case into a heartbreaking homicide investigation.

media:content.media:title: She Left A Bar With Three Men And Never Made It Home
media:content.media:description: Savannah Spurlock, a 22 year old mother of four, disappeared after leaving a Kentucky bar with three men she had just met. Months later, investigators found her remains on a rural property, turning a missing persons case into a heartbreaking homicide investigation.

item.title: His Secret Affair Ended In A Parking Lot Shooting
item.description: The Emmett Corrigan case shocked Idaho after a secret affair between a married attorney and his employee led to a deadly confrontation with her husband.

media:content.media:title: His Secret Affair Ended In A Parking Lot Shooting
media:content.media:description: The Emmett Corrigan case shocked Idaho after a secret affair between a married attorney and his employee led to a deadly confrontation with her husband.

item.title: Was Her Drowning Really An Accident?
item.description: Dee Dee Jackson was found dead in her boyfriend's swimming pool in 1994, but questions about her injuries and the circumstances of her death led investigators to suspect foul play. Four years later, her boyfriend, Don Bohana, was convicted of second degree murder, though he has always maintained that her drowning was accidental.

media:content.media:title: Was Her Drowning Really An Accident?
media:content.media:description: Dee Dee Jackson was found dead in her boyfriend's swimming pool in 1994, but questions about her injuries and the circumstances of her death led investigators to suspect foul play. Four years later, her boyfriend, Don Bohana, was convicted of second degree murder, though he has always maintained that her drowning was accidental.

item.description: Abducted At 5 Days Old From Inside His Home

media:content.media:title: Abducted At 5 Days Old From Inside His Home
media:content.media:description: Abducted At 5 Days Old From Inside His Home

item.title: She Left After An Argument And Was Found Months Later
item.description: The Erica Alonso case began when the 28 year old vanished after a Valentine's Day date and an argument with her boyfriend. Months later, her body was found in a remote area, but exactly how she died and who left her there remains a mystery.

media:content.media:title: She Left After An Argument And Was Found Months Later
media:content.media:description: The Erica Alonso case began when the 28 year old vanished after a Valentine's Day date and an argument with her boyfriend. Months later, her body was found in a remote area, but exactly how she died and who left her there remains a mystery.

item.title: She Built A Life Online Before Suddenly Vanishing
item.description: Alexis Sharkey's disappearance quickly became a national story after the social media influencer was found dead near her Houston home. Investigators ultimately focused on her husband, Thomas Sharkey, who died by suicide as authorities moved to arrest him in connection with the case.

media:content.media:title: She Built A Life Online Before Suddenly Vanishing
media:content.media:description: Alexis Sharkey's disappearance quickly became a national story after the social media influencer was found dead near her Houston home. Investigators ultimately focused on her husband, Thomas Sharkey, who died by suicide as authorities moved to arrest him in connection with the case.

item.title: She Went Out With A Family Friend And Never Came Home
item.description: Lesly Palacio disappeared after a night out in Las Vegas, and 11 days later her body was found in a remote desert area. Investigators later accused a longtime family friend of being responsible, turning the case into one of Nevada's most heartbreaking mysteries.

media:content.media:title: She Went Out With A Family Friend And Never Came Home
media:content.media:description: Lesly Palacio disappeared after a night out in Las Vegas, and 11 days later her body was found in a remote desert area. Investigators later accused a longtime family friend of being responsible, turning the case into one of Nevada's most heartbreaking mysteries.

item.title: A Pregnant Teen Left Home One Night And Never Returned
item.description: Mia Campos was 16 years old and expecting a baby when she left her Georgia home to meet someone on a summer night. Hours later, her family made a devastating discovery, and investigators began piecing together what happened during her final hours.

media:content.media:title: A Pregnant Teen Left Home One Night And Never Returned
media:content.media:description: Mia Campos was 16 years old and expecting a baby when she left her Georgia home to meet someone on a summer night. Hours later, her family made a devastating discovery, and investigators began piecing together what happened during her final hours.

item.title: A Fitbit Helped Solve This Murder?!
item.description:
This video tells the tragic true crime story of Nicole VanderHeyden, a dedicated mother and substitute science teacher from Green Bay, Wisconsin. After a night out in May 2016, she disappeared, and her body was discovered in a nearby field the following day.
Initially, suspicion fell on her boyfriend, Doug Deitrich, due to tensions in their relationship and his delay in reporting her missing. However, forensic evidence, including Doug's Fitbit data, ultimately cleared him of the crime. Investigators later identified the true perpetrator as George Birch, a man who had encountered Nicole on the night of her murder.

media:content.media:title: A Fitbit Helped Solve This Murder?!
media:content.media:description:
This video tells the tragic true crime story of Nicole VanderHeyden, a dedicated mother and substitute science teacher from Green Bay, Wisconsin. After a night out in May 2016, she disappeared, and her body was discovered in a nearby field the following day.
Initially, suspicion fell on her boyfriend, Doug Deitrich, due to tensions in their relationship and his delay in reporting her missing. However, forensic evidence, including Doug's Fitbit data, ultimately cleared him of the crime. Investigators later identified the true perpetrator as George Birch, a man who had encountered Nicole on the night of her murder.

item.title: She Answered One Last Phone Call And Vanished Forever
item.description: Heather Elvis disappeared after receiving calls linked to a married man she had previously been involved with. More than a decade later, nobody has found her, and the mystery continues despite kidnapping convictions connected to the case.

media:content.media:title: She Answered One Last Phone Call And Vanished Forever
media:content.media:description: Heather Elvis disappeared after receiving calls linked to a married man she had previously been involved with. More than a decade later, nobody has found her, and the mystery continues despite kidnapping convictions connected to the case.

item.title: A Deadly Love Triangle: The Murder of Adrianne Jones
item.description:
In 1995, 16 year old Adrianne Jones disappeared from her home in Texas, leaving family members desperate for answers. As investigators searched for clues, suspicion quickly focused on the people closest to her, uncovering a disturbing web of jealousy, betrayal, and manipulation.
Authorities later learned Adrianne had become caught in a volatile relationship dynamic involving her father and his girlfriend. What initially appeared to be a missing person case evolved into a shocking homicide investigation that exposed years of deception and heartbreaking family dysfunction.
The case horrified the nation because of the victim’s age, the people involved, and the devastating circumstances surrounding her death. Decades later, Adrianne Jones' story remains one of the most tragic and disturbing family murder cases in Texas history.

media:content.media:title: A Deadly Love Triangle: The Murder of Adrianne Jones
media:content.media:description:
In 1995, 16 year old Adrianne Jones disappeared from her home in Texas, leaving family members desperate for answers. As investigators searched for clues, suspicion quickly focused on the people closest to her, uncovering a disturbing web of jealousy, betrayal, and manipulation.
Authorities later learned Adrianne had become caught in a volatile relationship dynamic involving her father and his girlfriend. What initially appeared to be a missing person case evolved into a shocking homicide investigation that exposed years of deception and heartbreaking family dysfunction.
The case horrified the nation because of the victim’s age, the people involved, and the devastating circumstances surrounding her death. Decades later, Adrianne Jones' story remains one of the most tragic and disturbing family murder cases in Texas history.

item.title: She Faked Her Own Kidnapping To Hide A Secret
item.description: Chloe Stein sparked a massive search in Pennsylvania after claiming she had been abducted, but investigators later said she made the entire story up to hide the fact that she was no longer enrolled in college and wouldn't be graduating as expected.

media:content.media:title: She Faked Her Own Kidnapping To Hide A Secret
media:content.media:description: Chloe Stein sparked a massive search in Pennsylvania after claiming she had been abducted, but investigators later said she made the entire story up to hide the fact that she was no longer enrolled in college and wouldn't be graduating as expected.

item.title: Woman Convicted of Killing Boyfriend After He Left Her for Miss Ohio
item.description: This video, created by Kendall Rae, delves into the tragic murder of Ryan Poston, a bright young attorney whose life was cut short by his girlfriend, Shayna Hubers.

media:content.media:title: Woman Convicted of Killing Boyfriend After He Left Her for Miss Ohio
media:content.media:description: This video, created by Kendall Rae, delves into the tragic murder of Ryan Poston, a bright young attorney whose life was cut short by his girlfriend, Shayna Hubers.

item.title: Her Best Friends Planned Her Death Weeks In Advance
item.description: The Skylar Neese case horrified the nation after two of her closest friends secretly planned her murder, lured her out late at night, and carried out the attack before pretending to help search for her for months afterward.

media:content.media:title: Her Best Friends Planned Her Death Weeks In Advance
media:content.media:description: The Skylar Neese case horrified the nation after two of her closest friends secretly planned her murder, lured her out late at night, and carried out the attack before pretending to help search for her for months afterward.

item.title: The Great Pyramid Wasn't For The Pharaohs
item.description: The Great Pyramid Wasn't For The Pharaohs

media:content.media:title: The Great Pyramid Wasn't For The Pharaohs
media:content.media:description: The Great Pyramid Wasn't For The Pharaohs

item.title: A Single Drop of Blood Solved a Brutal Attack Nine Years Later
item.description:
In 2008, 17 year old Brittani Marcell was nearly killed after a violent attack inside her Albuquerque, New Mexico home. She suffered devastating injuries and spent years recovering, while investigators struggled to identify the person responsible.
For nearly a decade, the case remained unsolved. The breakthrough came when detectives matched DNA from a single drop of blood left at the scene to Justin Hansen. Investigators later arrested Hansen, and prosecutors argued the DNA evidence conclusively tied him to the attack.
Nine years after the assault, Hansen pleaded no contest to attempted murder and aggravated burglary charges. In 2018, he was sentenced to 18 years in prison, bringing a long awaited measure of justice to Brittani and her family.

media:content.media:title: A Single Drop of Blood Solved a Brutal Attack Nine Years Later
media:content.media:description:
In 2008, 17 year old Brittani Marcell was nearly killed after a violent attack inside her Albuquerque, New Mexico home. She suffered devastating injuries and spent years recovering, while investigators struggled to identify the person responsible.
For nearly a decade, the case remained unsolved. The breakthrough came when detectives matched DNA from a single drop of blood left at the scene to Justin Hansen. Investigators later arrested Hansen, and prosecutors argued the DNA evidence conclusively tied him to the attack.
Nine years after the assault, Hansen pleaded no contest to attempted murder and aggravated burglary charges. In 2018, he was sentenced to 18 years in prison, bringing a long awaited measure of justice to Brittani and her family.
